## Goal

Decide what gets a commission-log entry when a brief spawns one or more mandates. Current behavior logs per-mandate, which fragments the research signal — the mandates under a brief are implementation sub-units of one patron intent, not independent commissions. Target outcome: a commission-log model where briefs are first-class and mandate-level data flows back into the parent brief, rather than accumulating as separate rows the patron has to reconcile.
